---
title: ""
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: solana
  image: images/flavio_headshot_bluebg.png
  image-width: 25em
  image-shape: round
listing:
  - id: projects
    contents:
      - "portfolio/*/content.qmd"
    sort: date desc
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]
    max-items: 1
    image-height: "200"

  - id: talks
    contents:
      - "talks/*/content.qmd"
    sort: date desc
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]
    max-items: 1
    image-height: "200"

  - id: blog
    contents:
      - "blog/*/content.qmd"
    sort: date desc
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]
    max-items: 1
    image-height: "200"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: assets/index.css
toc: false
comments: false
extensions:
  iconify:
    style: "color: #0F2F3A;"
---

:::: {#hero-heading}
### DATA ANALYTICS CONSULTANT · 15+ CLIENTS · 8 INDUSTRIES

# Turning complex data into answers that drive business decisions

Building data solutions aligned with your business goals.

::: hero-icons
{{< iconify simple-icons tableau size=2x >}}
{{< iconify simple-icons powerbi size=2x >}}
{{< iconify fa6-solid database size=2x >}}
{{< iconify fa6-brands python size=2x >}}
{{< iconify simple-icons dbt size=2x >}}
{{< iconify fa6-solid file-excel size=2x >}}
:::

<a href="contact.qmd" 
class="button"> Contact Me </a>
::::

:::: clients-band
## Organizations I've worked with

::: {.clients-logos layout-ncol="8"}
![](images/about/clients/vmo.png)

![](images/about/clients/lloyds.png)

![](images/about/clients/IAG.png) 

![](images/about/clients/informa.png)

![](images/about/clients/sjp.png) 

![](images/about/clients/JW.png)

![](images/about/clients/northern.png) 

![](images/about/clients/TeF.png)
:::
::::

::: section-intro
## How I help organizations turn data into decisions
:::

:::::: {.grid .services-grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4 .service-card}
{{< iconify fa6-solid database size=2x >}}

### Data Engineering

Design reliable data pipelines, transform raw data into structured
datasets, and create scalable foundations for analytics.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4 .service-card}
{{< iconify fa6-solid chart-line size=2x >}}

### Analytics & Modeling

Use statistical models and exploratory analysis to uncover patterns,
measure performance, and support strategic decisions.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4 .service-card}
{{< iconify fa6-solid chart-simple size=2x >}}

### Dashboards & BI

Build clear and actionable dashboards in Tableau or Power BI that turn
complex data into accessible insights.
:::
::::::

::: {.lately-section}

## Latest work

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}

#### Projects
::: {#projects}
:::

[See all →](portfolio.qmd){.about-links}

:::

::: {.g-col-4}

#### Talks
::: {#talks}
:::

[See all →](talks.qmd){.about-links}

:::

::: {.g-col-4}

#### Blog
::: {#blog}
:::

[See all →](blog.qmd){.about-links}

:::

::::

:::
